description: Fragmentary legal record drafted in Fustat and including an incomplete date (Sivan 14[..] Seleucid). Involves Abū l-Surūr and Abū Saʿīd Ḥalfon. Written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli (fl. 1066–1108 CE). Dating: 1089–1108 CE, based on the partial year and Hillel b. ʿEli's active dates.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
